data.title: Ethereum price remains steady for $4,000 despite market downturn for Bitcoin and altcoins.
data.description: A significant decline in the unemployment rate was reported for the month of August, with the rate dropping to 5.2%, down from the previous month's rate of 6.1%. This decrease in unemployment marks a positive trend for the economy, with approximately 300,000 new jobs being added during this period. The labor force participation rate also saw an increase, rising to 63.4%. These latest figures indicate a strengthening job market and provide hope for continued economic recovery in the coming months.

data.title: ETH may reach $9,000 as tight supply, rising demand, and bullish tech align; supporters optimistic.
data.description: Ether is demonstrating increased resilience due to limited supply, growing demand, and positive technical indicators, driving ETH towards a potential target of $9,000.

data.title: Early Bitcoin investor sells 80,000 BTC for $9B through Galaxy Digital, one of the biggest crypto transactions, amid volatile trading.
data.description: A significant crypto transaction took place recently as a pioneering investor in Bitcoin liquidated 80,000 BTC via Galaxy Digital. This sale ranks among the most substantial in the cryptocurrency world, occurring during a trading session characterized by increased instability.

data.title: Graanul extends maturity of €630 million in Existing Notes to 2029 with an agreement from 50% of noteholders.
data.description: Cullinan Holdco SCSp, together with its subsidiaries under Graanul Group, announced entering a Transaction Support Agreement with Participating Holders, who represent 50% of the aggregate principal amount of its 4.625% Sustainability-Linked Senior Secured Notes due 2026 and Sustainability-Linked Senior Secured Notes. The agreement aims to support the financial transactions within the group. No further details were provided.

data.title: Stocks including Meta, Amazon, and Microsoft report earnings, Fed meeting and Trump tariff deadline approaching. Tesla robotaxi could launch in San Francisco.
data.description: Leading the earnings wave are Meta, Amazon, and Microsoft, while a Federal Reserve meeting and a looming Trump tariff deadline are also on the horizon. Tesla's robotaxi service is potentially looking to expand its reach to San Francisco, albeit with some conditions. The Dow Jones Futures are showing activity in anticipation of developments related to Meta, Amazon, the Federal Reserve meeting, Trump tariffs, and the potential expansion of Tesla's robotaxi service in San Francisco.

data.title: Dow and S&P rise on Trump-China deal hopes. Tesla stock up on robotaxi plans. Dow Jones index surged after economic data.
data.description: Following the release of unexpected economic data, the Dow Jones index experienced a notable increase. This boost was further fueled by Tesla stock surging due to its announcement regarding the launch of a robotaxi service. Additionally, speculations surrounding a potential trade deal between the U.S. and China contributed to the positive movement of the market. Influential investor Cathie Wood notably increased her holdings in Tesla stock during this period.

data.title: Travelzoo offers club members in Canada $1999-$2199 for 8 nights in Switzerland by train with flights included.
data.description: In Canada, Travelzoo® (NASDAQ: TZOO) has unveiled exclusive Club Offers for Club Members with exciting travel opportunities. For travel enthusiasts, there is a special deal on a trip to SWITZERLAND BY TRAIN: 8 NIGHTS W/FLIGHTS priced between $1999 and $2199. This offer has been carefully curated and negotiated to provide a memorable experience for members.

data.title: LivePerson (Nasdaq: LPSN) reports inducement grants under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) on July 25, 2025.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, LivePerson, Inc. (Nasdaq: LPSN) announced that they have issued equity-based incentive awards in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). This notice serves as confirmation of the recent grants made by LivePerson under the LivePerson Inc. 2018 Inducement Program.

data.title: aPriori Founder Ray S. highlights latency and fair sequencing as key barriers hindering DeFi from matching TradFi speeds. Emphasizes censorship resistance and cites Monad as a promising chain to close execution gap. Launched Swapr DEX with backing from Pantera Capital.
data.description: Ray S., the founder of aPriori, stated in an interview with Benzinga that issues with latency and lack of fair sequencing are the primary infrastructure barriers hindering decentralized finance (DeFi) from matching the rapid execution rates seen in traditional finance. He emphasized the significance of decentralization, particularly censorship resistance, as a crucial factor that deters major traditional financial (TradFi) institutions from investing capital on blockchain platforms like Ethereum's layer 2 solutions and alternative layer 1 chains. Ray highlighted that without censorship resistance, TradFi firms face anti-money laundering (AML) and compliance hurdles that restrict their involvement in on-chain activities. He suggested that emerging chains like Monad show promise in addressing the execution speed disparity while maintaining decentralization standards. Additionally, aPriori recently launched Swapr, a high-performance decentralized exchange (DEX) aggregator aiming to introduce high-frequency trading (HFT) capabilities to DeFi. The project has received backing from Pantera Capital.

data.title: FCPT buys BJ’s Restaurant & Brewhouse and Longhorn Steakhouse properties in Pennsylvania from Brookfield for $4.8M.
data.description: In Mill Valley, California, Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT) has acquired a BJ’s Restaurant and Brewhouse property and a LongHorn Steakhouse property for $4.8 million from Brookfield Properties. These properties, situated in a thriving retail area in Pennsylvania, are operated by the corporations under triple net leases. FCPT, a real estate investment trust specializing in high-quality, net-leased restaurant properties, announced this recent acquisition with positivity.
Kinross to sell shares in White Gold in latest move. Transaction involves significant number of shares.

data.title: Sidus Space plans public offering of Class A common stock, aiming to sell shares to raise capital. #SIDU #SpaceTech
data.description: In Cape Canaveral, Florida, Sidus Space, Inc. revealed plans for a public offering to sell shares of its Class A common stock (including Pre-Funded Warrants) on the Nasdaq under the ticker SIDU. The company specializes in space and defense technology, catering to various sectors globally. Sidus aims to raise funds through this offering to support its innovative and cost-effective solutions for government, defense, intelligence, and commercial clients. This move signifies the company's commitment to expanding its market presence and increasing its capital for future endeavors.

data.title: Birks Group reports 4.0% decrease in net sales, totaling $177.8 million for fiscal year ended March 29, 2025.
data.description: In Montreal, Birks Group Inc. announced its financial results for the fiscal year ending March 29, 2025. All figures are in Canadian dollars. Net sales for fiscal 2025 were $177.8 million, showing a 4.0% decrease from the previous fiscal year which had net sales of $185.3 million. Comparable store sales for fiscal 2025 also declined. The Company trades on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol BGI.

data.title: DOJ mulls charging Dragonfly in connection with Tornado Cash amid Roman Storm's trial. #Crypto #VC #DOJ #charges
data.description: In the recent criminal trial of Tornado Cash developer Roman Storm, federal prosecutors disclosed their deliberation on potentially pressing criminal charges against Dragonfly.

data.title: Berklee freshman Oliver Charles awarded $10,000 Wilshire Quinn Musical Arts Scholarship.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, Wilshire Quinn Capital, Inc. revealed the recipient of the $10,000 Wilshire Quinn Musical Arts Scholarship. The recipient is Oliver Charles, an 18-year-old guitarist from Los Angeles, California. This scholarship aims to support young talented individuals in pursuing their musical aspirations. The funds awarded will go directly towards furthering Oliver's musical education and career development.

data.title: Law firm Edelson Lechtzin LLP investigates data breach at Premier Health, detected on Jan 17, 2025.
data.description: An investigation is underway by Edelson Lechtzin LLP, a law firm in suburban Philadelphia, into data privacy claims related to a breach at Premier Health. Premier Health discovered a data breach around January 17, 2025. People seeking more information can...

data.title: 150 accredited investors learn about diversification in DST and 721 UPREIT options at annual Kay Investor Day.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Dwight Kay, the Founder and CEO of Kay Properties & Investments, spoke to a crowd of 150 accredited investors, stressing the significance of having access to various Delaware Statutory Trust (DST) and 721 UPREIT offerings. During the Kay Investor Day investor conference, Kay highlighted the importance of diversification and encouraged investors to consider exploring multiple exchange opportunities for making well-informed decisions. Kay emphasized the critical role of diversification and the necessity for investors to investigate various exchange opportunities to ensure informed decision-making.
